hypothesis: If a multi-stage AI-guided pipeline combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X chemical space, then it will identify and design novel silicon-based anode materials with theoretical capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable lithium-ion migration channels (large, geometry-invariant channel radius between charged and discharged states), because integrating geometric channel analysis with graph neural network relaxation and CVAE-based structure generation enables systematic exploration beyond known compounds while enforcing electrochemical and structural stability constraints.
